case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. ABEL ANIBAL SOLANO MEJICANOS

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $50.00- SERVED JUL-08-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MEJICANOS, ABEL ANIBAL SOLANO
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) MARICRUZ CEDANO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-14-2019 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. REPRESENTED BY MARICRUZ CEDANO LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ABEL ANIBAL SOLANO MEJICANOS IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT MEJICANOS, ABEL ANIBAL SOLANO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-14-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MEJICANOS, ABEL ANIBAL SOLANO $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,600.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
